hiker.name: Asha Rawat
hiker.route: Kedartal ridge trail, booth 3 to booth 5

ledgerContext:
09:00 booth3: Asha Rawat checked out solo, headed toward booth5 via ridge trail.
13:40 booth4 radio: no sighting of Asha Rawat today; weather clear.
14:10 weather-net: light snow flurries reported above 4000m near the ridge trail since 13:30.
15:00 booth5: Asha Rawat has not checked in, now 0h overdue at expected time.
15:05 porter-relay: a porter descending from booth5 direction says he passed a solo woman hiker resting near a cairn about 2 hours ago, seemed fine and moving slowly.
